ddls:
CREATE TABLE "futures_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each futures contract */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the futures contract */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the futures contract */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the contract is traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract is traded */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract expires */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., futures, options) */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset of the contract */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price movement */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Last date the contract can be traded */,
  "settlement_method" TEXT /* Method of settlement (e.g., physical, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the futures contract being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade occurred */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the trade */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the trade */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the trade */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the trade */,
  "settle_price" REAL /* Settlement price of the trade */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous trade */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of the trade */,
  "efp" INTEGER /* Exchange for Physical (EFP) volume */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest at the end of the trading day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the trade */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES futures_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was updated */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio holding the position */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the futures contract in the position */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the contract in the position */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the position was entered */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the position was exited */,
  "average_entry_price" REAL /* Average price at which the position was entered */,
  "average_exit_price" REAL /* Average price at which the position was exited */,
  "realized_profit_loss" REAL /* Realized profit or loss of the position */,
  "unrealized_profit_loss" REAL /* Unrealized profit or loss of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES futures_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with the order */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the futures contract in the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the contract in the order */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was entered */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was exited */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, canceled) */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., API, web, mobile) */,
  "leverage" INTEGER /* Leverage used for the order */,
  "stop_loss_price" REAL /* Stop loss price for the order */,
  "take_profit_price" REAL /* Take profit price for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES futures_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_execution" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was executed */,
  "execution_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the contract executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was executed */,
  "execution_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the order was executed */,
  "execution_type" TEXT /* Type of execution (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., partial, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_execution_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the futures contract */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the market data */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the market data */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the market data */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the market data */,
  "settle_price" REAL /* Settlement price of the market data */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous market data point */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of the market data */,
  "efp" INTEGER /* Exchange for Physical (EFP) volume */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest at the end of the trading day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the market data */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES futures_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the futures contract related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the article to the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES futures_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for sentiment analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the futures contract being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the futures contract */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES futures_contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation metric was calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the metric calculation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)
